data.title: Test failures during commit workflow lack sub-agent resolution loop
data.description: When tests fail during the commit workflow, there is no automated resolution loop analogous to what exists for review failures. Review failures trigger a sub-agent resolution loop (up to review.max_resolution_attempts) that attempts to fix issues autonomously before escalating. Test failures should follow a similar pattern: detect the failure, dispatch a sub-agent to attempt a fix, re-run the failing test, and repeat up to a bounded number of attempts before escalating to the user.
